mapper.select: SELECT d.id,d.name doctorName,d.title,d.avatar,h.name hospitalName,dt.name departmentName FROM t_doctor d INNER JOIN t_hospital h ON d.hospital_id=h.id INNER JOIN t_department dt ON d.department_id=dt.id limit #{limit}

SELECT d.id, d.name doctorName, d.title, d.avatar, h.name hospitalName, dt.name departmentName, dt.id departmentId FROM t_doctor d INNER JOIN t_hospital h ON d.hospital_id = h.id INNER JOIN t_department dt ON d.department_id = dt.id WHERE dt.id = #{parentDepartmentId} OR dt.parent_id = #{parentDepartmentId} ORDER BY d.follow_count DESC

SELECT d.id, d.name doctorName, d.gender, d.title, d.avatar, h.name hospitalName, h.id hospitalId, dt.name departmentName, dt.id departmentId, d.phone, d.intro, d.expertise, d.consult_count consultCount, d.rating, d.follow_count followCount, d.online_status onlineStatus, d.price, d.registration_price registrationPrice FROM t_doctor d INNER JOIN t_hospital h ON d.hospital_id = h.id INNER JOIN t_department dt ON d.department_id = dt.id WHERE d.id = #{id}

SELECT d.id, d.name, d.gender, d.title, d.department_id AS departmentId, dt.name AS departmentName, d.hospital_id AS hospitalId, h.name AS hospitalName, d.avatar, d.phone, d.intro, d.expertise, d.consult_count AS consultCount, d.rating, d.follow_count AS followCount, d.online_status AS onlineStatus, d.price, d.registration_price AS registrationPrice, d.status FROM t_doctor d LEFT JOIN t_department dt ON d.department_id = dt.id LEFT JOIN t_hospital h ON d.hospital_id = h.id WHERE d.id = #{doctorId}

SELECT time_slot AS timeSlot, remain_count AS remainCount, total_count AS totalCount, status FROM t_schedule WHERE doctor_id = #{doctorId} AND schedule_date = #{scheduleDate} ORDER BY FIELD( time_slot, '08:00-09:00', '09:00-10:00', '10:00-11:00', '14:00-15:00', '15:00-16:00', '16:00-17:00' )
